visuals.title: Flowchart for Search Strategies
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Flowchart for Search Strategies
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Example Problems</text>
  
  <!-- Problem 1 -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Problem 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Problem 2 -->
  <rect x="50" y="140" width="120" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Problem 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Problem 3 -->
  <rect x="50" y="220" width="120" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Problem 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Solution Arrow -->
  <path d="M200 90 C 250 90, 300 90, 350 90" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="5,5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M200 170 C 250 170, 300 170, 350 170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="5,5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M200 250 C 250 250, 300 250, 350 250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="5,5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Solution Boxes -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Solution 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="140" width="120" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Solution 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="220" width="120" height="60" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Solution 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
